task:
In Google Chrome, load file:///home/user/Documents/notes.html ('Quick Notes', with a title input, body textarea, Add Note button, and a list with delete buttons).

Create these three notes in this exact order:
1. title `Grocery List`, body `Milk, eggs, bread, coffee`
2. title `Sprint Planning`, body `Review backlog and assign Monday stories`
3. title `Scratch`, body `temporary placeholder`

Then delete the `Scratch` note so only `Grocery List` and `Sprint Planning` remain. The `Total notes` counter must read `2`, and `Scratch` must no longer be present.

verification.description: Note 'Grocery List' is on the page
Note 'Sprint Planning' is on the page
'Scratch' note is no longer on the page
